waiting_for: Akin to confirm and continue to Stage 2

stages_completed.name: Strategic Assessment
stages_completed.notes: Assessment written. Key insight: site IS the proof of capability, portfolio needs motion, D&G competition is very weak.

stages_completed.name: Research
stages_completed.notes: 3 parallel subagents: market research (12 premium agency sites), competitor audit (14 D&G/Borders/Carlisle competitors — bar is extremely low), online presence audit (zero presence beyond website and GitHub).

stages_completed.name: References + Brief
stages_completed.notes: 5 reference sites analysed: lusion.co, makebuild.studio, michaelpumo.com, kota.co.uk, mallardandclaret.com. Common threads: dark mode, generous whitespace, scroll text reveals, video portfolio, minimal nav. Brief written.

stages_completed.name: Design Research + Theme Planning
stages_completed.notes: 7 design constraints defined. 16 anti-patterns listed. 5 ThemeConfig objects created — one per reference site. Archive is empty so full creative freedom.

key_decisions.design_count: 5 designs (not the standard 3) — Akin requested more options
key_decisions.dark_mode: All designs must be dark mode
key_decisions.portfolio_motion: Video thumbnails and/or sticky stacking cards — no static screenshots
key_decisions.nav_style: Minimal — logo + CTA visible, hamburger for full menu
key_decisions.tools_pages: Keep live and indexed, remove from navigation
key_decisions.target_market: Scotland primary (positioning against Glasgow/Edinburgh agencies), UK-wide secondary
key_decisions.usp: Websites that rival Edinburgh's top agencies — built faster, priced fairer

notes_for_next_session: 5 ThemeConfig objects are in themes.json — each responds to a different reference site
Design constraints and anti-patterns are in design-research.json
Competitor audit saved to memory for cold call reference
No same-industry entries in archive — full creative freedom
Akin wants to get the brand right this time for consistency — commit to the chosen direction
